title: Seq7771 Best-Crop Component-82 P005 Gain
module_detail: Best-crop generated-positive CTF stabilizes component 82 as a scheduler target; M8 moves one residual island seq3403; M12 verifies direct, density_simple, and p005_area delivery.
used_in_pipeline: candidate-only now; eligible to become next default after reproduce.sh verification and demo.sh integration
summary: A seq7771 best-crop CTF pass makes component 82 a stable generated-positive target. The focused SigLIP scheduler proposes rank17, moving seq3403 from comp11/gid96000012 to comp82/gid960000202. Canonical p005_area IDF1 improves from 0.669466 to 0.669494.
implementation: No anchors or GT labels are used as identity evidence. The method starts from the previous no-anchor best assignment, rebuilds a MCAM08-focused SigLIP/weak/DINO subpart candidate manifest from tracklet features, materializes SigLIP rank17 as a one-tracklet repair, exports a fresh submission zip, runs direct full-score, then validates density_simple and p005_area. GT is used only by the evaluator after materialization.

workflow_steps.input: raw crops for seq7771 plus hard counters 8315/8336
workflow_steps.action: use best-crop-only generated-positive admission after DINOv2/SigLIP CTF

workflow_steps.input: previous best assignment plus SigLIP primary fused with weakmetric and DINO features
workflow_steps.output: SigLIP rank17 candidate: seq3403 comp11 -> comp82

workflow_steps.action: materialize only seq3403; no broad component merge
score direct, density_simple, then p005_area with config_name and dropped-row checks

improvement_table.decision: below best but continue because direct is positive

per_video_table.note: changed source tracklet seq3403 in MCAM04

environment: Python with numpy pandas pyarrow reid-hota scikit-learn Pillow
OPENAI_API_KEY not required for this promoted gain and never stored in commands/files

visual_cases.summary: SigLIP rank17 moves seq3403 from comp11/gid96000012 to comp82/gid960000202 after component 82 is admitted as a DINO/SigLIP-stable generated-positive target.
